notes: ChIP-seq bundle is a thin orchestration wrapper around nf-core/chipseq

notes: count_matrix_qc README lists WDL-style input parameters including CountMatrixQc.input_file

query: how does the GATK germline variant calling nextflow workflow support single and multi-sample cohort execution
notes: WGS GATK bundle README describes single-sample and cohort modes with JSON input

notes: pharmacogenomics README lists CYP2D6, CYP2C19, CYP2C9, CYP3A5, NAT2 star allele calling

notes: longread_sv README lists Sniffles2, PBSV, SURVIVOR_MERGE, and ANNOTATE_SV steps

notes: metagenomics README describes FASTQC→Kraken2→Bracken→MultiQC pipeline flow

notes: kraken_classification README explains k-mer based classification against RefSeq before Bracken

notes: spaceranger_visium_count bundle supports comma-separated multi-lane FASTQ directories

notes: imc_segmentation README mentions Cellpose and DeepCell models

notes: multimodal_integration README lists rna_matrix, atac_matrix, protein_matrix, clinical_data inputs

notes: GRN workflow uses SCENIC+, CellOracle, Pando, FigR, DIRECT-NET, TRIPOD, scMEGA

notes: peptide_identification README describes database searching, spectral library matching, FDR estimation

notes: flow_cytometry_comp README lists FlowCytometryComp.sample_id and input_file parameters

notes: VDJtools README describes diversity metrics, shared clonotype finding, and clonal dynamics tracking

notes: crispr_ml README describes k-mer feature encoding, efficiency model, off-target estimator, ranking

notes: geo_search plugin README lists query, organism, experiment_type, max_results parameters

notes: epigenomics bundle README lists peak_calling, chromatin_state, enhancer_prediction, report modules

notes: tool-runtime Kubernetes smoke test doc describes minimal validation of container execution via RESULT_URI

query: what does the OmniBioAI model registry provide for immutable versioning and staged promotion of ML models
notes: model-registry README covers write-once versioning, SHA256 integrity, latest→staging→production promotion

query: what quality control checks does the variant QC filtering plugin apply to genomic VCF files before downstream analysis
notes: variant_qc_filtering README describes format-level and evidence-level sanity checks as Stage-1 QC gate

query: how does the clinical trial matching pipeline score and rank patients against trial eligibility criteria
notes: clinical_trial_matching README describes genomic biomarker matching, eligibility scoring, HTML report generation

notes: scoped to clinical bundle — disambiguates from clinical_trial_matching and other clinical-adjacent repos
